user.description: Setup your Too Good To Go account

item_ids.description:
Optional item IDs to collect

By default this integration only collects favourite items from the app, if you want to see other items, add them here.

pin.description: Enter the PIN from the Too Good To Go email.

failed.description: Login failed. Click submit to try again.

error.captcha: Additional verification required by Too Good To Go. You can try again.
error.unknown_login_error: Authentication failed. Check the logs for more information.

progress.login: Sending a Too Good To Go login email. Check your inbox for a PIN code.

abort.captcha: Additional verification is required. Try again later.
abort.unknown_login_error: Authentication failed. Check the logs for more information.
abort.import_missing_email: YAML import failed - email is required. Please add email to your YAML config or set up the integration manually.

too_many_requests.message: Too many requests were made to the API. Updates have been delayed for 1 hour.

api_error.message: An unknown error occurred. Check the logs for more information.
